Speaker 1: ...and after you've delivered the drinks, you take the empty tray....
sweetheart: Gunther, Gunther, please, I've worked here for two and a half years, I know the empty trays go over there.
Speaker 1: What if you put them here.
sweetheart: Huh. Well, y'know that's actually a really good idea, because that way they'll be closer to the mugs. Y'know what, you should have the other waitresses do that too.
Speaker 1: They already do. That's why they call it the 'tray spot.'
sweetheart: Gee, I always heard them talk about that, I just always thought that it was a club they went to. Oh God, I'm, I'm sorry.
Speaker 1: It's all right. Sweetheart.
